title: calceolaria × pardanthera
intro: Calceolaria × pardanthera, also known as the slipper flower, is a hybrid plant species that combines the characteristics of Calceolaria uniflora and C. pinnatifida. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Calceolaria × pardanthera include its ability to help reduce inflammation, ease congestion, and promote relaxation. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory problems and promote overall well-being.
